samples.xml_description:
<module id="pulse_detect">
    <description>Pulse Detection Module</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="data_in">One-bit input signal.</input>
        <output id="data_out">Output signal indicating the presence of pulses.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state id="INITIAL">Initial state.</state>
        <state id="WAIT_FOR_ONE">Waiting for '1'.</state>
        <state id="ONE_DETECTED">'1' detected.</state>
        <state id="WAIT_FOR_ZERO">Waiting for '0'.</state>
        <state id="ZERO_DETECTED">'0' detected.</state>
        <state id="PULSE_END">End of pulse.</state>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <reg id="state" width_description="[2:0]">State register.</reg>
        <reg id="next_state" width_description="[2:0]">Next state register.</reg>
        <always_comb>
            case(state)
                INITIAL: begin
                    if(data_in == 1'b1) begin
                        next_state = WAIT_FOR_ZERO;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = INITIAL;
                    end
                end
                WAIT_FOR_ONE: begin
                    if(data_in == 1'b1) begin
                        next_state = ONE_DETECTED;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = INITIAL;
                    end
                end
                ONE_DETECTED: begin
                    if(data_in == 1'b0) begin
                        next_state = WAIT_FOR_ONE;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = PULSE_END;
                    end
                end
                WAIT_FOR_ZERO: begin
                    if(data_in == 1'b0) begin
                        next_state = ZERO_DETECTED;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = WAIT_FOR_ONE;
                    end
                end
                ZERO_DETECTED: begin
                    if(data_in == 1'b0) begin
                        next_state = PULSE_END;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = WAIT_FOR_ZERO;
                    end
                end
                PULSE_END: begin
                    if(data_in == 1'b0) begin
                        next_state = INITIAL;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = WAIT_FOR_ZERO;
                    end
                end
                default: next_state = INITIAL;
            endcase
        </always_comb>
        
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if(~rst_n) begin
                state <= INITIAL;
            end else begin
                state <= next_state;
            end
        end
        
        always @(*) begin
            case(state)
                INITIAL: begin
                    data_out = 1'b0;
                end
                WAIT_FOR_ONE: begin
                    data_out = 1'b0;
                end
                ONE_DETECTED: begin
                    data_out = 1'b0;
                end
                WAIT_FOR_ZERO: begin
                    data_out = 1'b0;
                end
                ZERO_DETECTED: begin
                    data_out = 1'b0;
                end
                PULSE_END: begin
                    data_out = 1'b1;
                end
                default: data_out = 1'b0;
            endcase
        end
    </logic_description>
    
    <implementation>Sequential logic for pulse detection based on the state machine.</implementation>
</module>
